name: BSAAE 2018 Rural Finance and Cooperatives Thesis

program.title: Bachelor of Science in Agricultural and Applied Economics
program.description: The Bachelor of Science in Agricultural and Applied Economics (BS AAE) is a four-year undergraduate degree program with a long history. It was first offered as the Bachelor of Science in Agricultural Economics (BS AECO) in 1976. On 28 August 2019, the BS AAE program was approved and replaced BS AECO to cater to the needs of students in the 21st century. This revised program is guided by the concept of outcome-based education by setting clear standards that are observable and measurable in favor of students. The BS AAE program aims to produce students who: (1) have a technical background in agriculture and related sciences; (2) have understanding of the economic theories and tools in analyzing issues and problems in the agriculture and related sectors; and (3) are able to provide insights on policies and strategies relating to sustainable agricultural and rural development. Students can choose from five fields of specialization: 1) production economics and farm management, 2) agricultural marketing and prices, 3) rural finance and cooperatives, 4) natural resource economics, and 5) foodand nutrition economics.
